name: x402-gateway-mcp
description: x402 analytics: the live x402 market feed for agents — a free x402_market_pulse tool with ecosystem listings by category, new services, and npm trends, refreshed 3x/day — plus 17 pay-per-call data tools (USDC on Base via x402, no API keys): crypto prices, DeFi TVL, on-chain DEX pools, gas, FX rates, US Treasury yields, US weather, WHOIS, DNS, email validation, web-to-markdown extraction, Hacker News, Wikipedia, npm/PyPI package health, token risk scoring, $1 domain dossiers. Built-in per-call and per-session spend caps.
